name: Sec Red NCD 8.52% Sr.I
summary: Sec Red NCD 8.52% Sr.I represents a secured, redeemable, non-convertible debenture issued by Shriram Transport Finance Limited, offering a fixed interest rate of 8.52% and belonging to Series I of the issuance; it is a debt instrument used by the company to raise capital from the public; Shriram Transport Finance Limited is an asset financing NBFC focused on providing financing solutions to commercial vehicle owners.
